name: repo-safety-audit
description: Security and trust audit for any third-party Claude Code skill, plugin, MCP server, GitHub repo, or npm package before you install it. Six-step audit checks for prompt injection, shell exfiltration, obfuscation, import mismatch, suspicious URLs, and developer reputation. Returns a SAFE / CAUTION / AVOID verdict with citations. Auto-prompts you to run the audit any time a GitHub URL appears in your message.
